title: Transcript Entry
description: A permanent record of a user's proficiency score for a single topic.

user-email.description: The user's email address to act as a unique identifier. Ex: 'user@example.com'

topic.description: The topic identifier for which proficiency is being recorded. Kebab case. Ex: 'addition'

topic-list.description: HTTP(S) URL to the versioned topic list (YAML/JSON)

score.description: The degree of proficiency for a specific topic. [unaware, aware, familiar, competent, fluent]

issued-at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this topic's score was recorded.

valid-until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this topic's score expires.

issued-by.description: Domain name of the entity that issued this transcript entry. Ex: 'example.com'

verification-url.description: HTTPS URL to the issuer verification API endpoint. Used for additional confirmation of this transcript entry.

certificate.description: x.509 certificate in PEM format with embedded Ed25519 signature used to verify authenticity of this transcript entry.
